description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior features large windows, a spacious balcony on the upper floor, and a covered patio area on the ground level. The property is enclosed by a white fence and includes a driveway leading to a garage on the right side. The landscaping incorporates a row of tall, sculptural plants along one side and a blossoming tree in the backyard, adding natural accents to the geometric structure. The house has a mix of open and private outdoor spaces, including a paved patio and green lawn. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balcony, and a fenced yard featuring sculptural plants and a blossoming tree. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with a garage and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, garage, and covered patio, with the sculptural plants and blossoming tree visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and paved patio area, with the backyard and blossoming tree partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, blossoming tree, and the back facade of the house with fewer windows and a more private appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the row of tall sculptural plants, the backyard, and the side of the house with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door under a covered patio, with no steps, columns, or ornate decorations, emphasizing a minimalist modern style.
